summary: BUG: 3 concurrent installs starve CPU-pod wrapper -> SSE bad-response -> UI freeze. Root cause traced (no install serialization, wrapper.py:1563). Found during MPI-148 live verify.
Added symptom 2: false archive-produced-no-folder (wrapper.py:1424 set-diff, no fallback, extraction actually succeeded). Same concurrency root; folded in. bad-response also seen single-install.
